reason: Single source of truth for the 6 gap fixes (P0-1/P0-2/P0-3/P1-4/P1-5/P1-7) and the 3 ADR-lite decisions (Q1/Q2/Q3=A); all PRs consume this.
Original Phase A/B plan defining the cs-req injection, Coordinator architecture, and immutable constraints (Workflow Engine sole writer / e2e must pass / Coordinator never bypasses gates).
User-facing requirement workflow spec — PR4 must update its flow diagram + add the awaiting_clarification chapter without contradicting the rest.
Coordinator already reads keywords/threshold/system_prompt via getConfig(); PR3 must extend the LLM fallback selection through the same layer rather than hard-coding.
Cross-package thinking-guide index; tells sub-agents which guide applies to a layer.
PR1+PR2+PR3 all cross the api↔web↔runner boundary; this guide governs how the firstMessage payload, status enum, and triage projectId flow without breaking layer contracts.
PR3 must reuse existing buildAgentBackendCliSpawn / resolveAgentBackendCliCandidates / claudeCliAvailable patterns when adding the codex fallback channel — no parallel spawn helpers.
API layer entry index — PR1 must conform to its routing/store/store-method conventions when extending POST /workflow-requests.
Where to add atomic-write helpers and which test directory hosts the new vitest cases.
Atomic insert (request + first message) must follow store transaction conventions; no ad-hoc db.prepare outside store/.
Status whitelist rejection (PATCH workflow-requests/:id/status) must use the project's standard 4xx error shape — not bespoke text.
Vitest coverage expectations for new route paths.
Runner layer entry index — PR3 lives here; covers cmd/watch and agents/coordinator conventions.
Defines the cross-platform CLI spawn contract (claude/codex/Windows shim). PR3's codex fallback path MUST reuse it instead of inventing a new spawn helper.
Coordinator pause_for_human is the standard error-degradation pattern; new codex-channel failures must follow it.
Vitest expectations for coordinator triage tests covering 3 backend-availability combinations.
Web frontend layer index — PR2 lives here; submitWorkflowRequest, dual-badge rendering.
How to add the user-tag-vs-coordinator-tag dual badge consistent with existing pill / panelHeader components.
Coordinator chat state already uses Map<requestId, state>; PR2 must extend coordinatorChats / preflight cache without new state silos.
WorkflowRequestDto type extensions for firstMessage echo / coordinator decision must keep strict typing — no any leaks.
ensureProjectAgentBackendReady / preflight already lives in the form path; PR2 should not regress its single-flight semantics.
Shared types layer index — WorkflowRequestStatus, MessageRole, CoordinatorAction all live here; PR1 must keep them exported correctly.
Cross-package contract for agent backend kinds (claude_code / codex); PR3 must respect this when picking fallback CLI by project preference.
